title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Narayana Health Digital - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Narayana Health Digital - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Narayana Health Digital! We are hiring a Backend Developer for our Gwalior team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Narayana Health Digital:
Narayana Health Digital is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Narayana Health Digital!
